_doc: JTO unlock schedule from defillama.com/unlocks/jito. 85.72% unlocked / 14.28% × 1b = ~143m JTO remaining locked. Three concurrent linear schedules visible: Core Contributors + Investors (2y from Dec 6 2024, ending Dec 6 2026); Ecosystem Development (3y from Dec 6 2023, ending Dec 6 2026); Airdrop tail extension (small ongoing rate). Daily rates per DL event panel: Core Contributors 223,571 JTO/day, Investors 147,857/day, Ecosystem Development 228,143/day, Airdrop 27,386/day.

events.note: 223,571 JTO/day × 730 days = 163.2m JTO. Team allocation continues per chart through 2027 — extend if visible.
228,143 JTO/day × 1096 days = 250m JTO. Note from DL: ~6 year linear schedule estimated for Community Growth and Ecosystem Development.
